# meanstest.org

> Plain-English guide to the bankruptcy means test under 11 U.S.C. Section 707(b).

meanstest.org is a free, open-source educational resource about the bankruptcy means test. Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project.

## Pages

- https://meanstest.org/: Overview of the means test and links to all topics
- https://meanstest.org/how-it-works.html: The two-step means test process -- income vs. median and disposable income
- https://meanstest.org/median-income.html: Current Census Bureau median income by state and household size
- https://meanstest.org/deductions.html: IRS National Standards, Local Standards, and actual expense deductions
- https://meanstest.org/what-if-you-fail.html: Presumption of abuse, rebutting it, military exemptions, Chapter 13 alternative
- https://meanstest.org/calculator.html: Free means test calculator -- enter state, household size, income
- https://meanstest.org/chapter-13-means-test.html: How income determines Chapter 13 plan length (3 vs. 5 years)
- https://meanstest.org/common-mistakes.html: Common means test errors that change your result
- https://meanstest.org/index-es.html: Guia en espanol -- La prueba de medios

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
